deploy.startCommand: /bin/sh -lc 'chown -R hermes:hermes /opt/data 2>/dev/null || true; exec su hermes -s /bin/sh -c "cd /opt/data; /opt/hermes/.venv/bin/hermes dashboard --host ${HERMES_DASHBOARD_HOST:-0.0.0.0} --port ${HERMES_DASHBOARD_PORT:-9119} --insecure --skip-build --no-open & exec /opt/hermes/.venv/bin/hermes gateway run --replace --accept-hooks"'
